hero.headline: *Cut, ground, cleaned up* — like we were never here
hero.subheadline: Same crew shows up on time, does the work right, and leaves your yard cleaner than they found it.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every job handled right
services_section.subheading: From dangerous removals to clean stump grinding — one call covers it all

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Safe removal of hazardous, diseased, or unwanted trees. We handle the big ones without touching your house or fence.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Complete stump removal down to wood chips. No ugly stumps left behind — just smooth, plantable ground.

services.title: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.description: Proper cuts to keep trees healthy and away from your roof. Crown thinning and deadwood removal.

services.title: Storm Cleanup
services.description: Emergency tree removal after storms. We clear fallen trees and debris to get you back to normal fast.

about.heading: Huntsville's tree crew
about.body: We're the team your neighbors call when trees need to go. Professional work, fair quotes, and we clean up every branch.

reviews.name: Daniel R.
reviews.text: Michael and his team were on time, meticulous, and pleasant to work with. Did exactly what they quoted without any upselling. True professionals!

reviews.name: Ines O.
reviews.text: Great experience with Michael! Professional, knowledgeable and the price was right for stump removal. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: William N.
reviews.text: Clean, punctual team that took extra care to prevent damage to shrubs, house, and neighbors' property. Great work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: Professional tree services throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready to clear those trees?
cta.body: Free estimates on all tree work. We'll walk your property, explain the job, and give you an honest price.
